name: openEuler Packaging SIG
description: The openEuler package management team is the software package management organization under the openEuler technical committee. It maintains the software package packaging specifications of the openEuler community, maintains public software packages, and coordinates and decides on package dependency issues during version release in the openEuler community.

name: openEuler Packaging SIG Repository List
description: openEuler Packaging SIG maintains 4 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Packaging SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The openEuler package management team is the software package management organization under the openEuler technical committee. It maintains the software package packaging specifications of the openEuler community, maintains public software packages, and coordinates and decides on package dependency issues during version release in the openEuler community.. The SIG has 9 core members and maintains 4 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Packaging SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Packaging SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Packaging SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Packaging SIG maintains 4 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Packaging.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Packaging SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Packaging SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: xiaowen He, cihua Li, feng Hu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
